title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Wano Citizens, Kid as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You`re going to have to eat all of it, sir.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What? Are you asking for a beating?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Run away, every- one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hey!! Kaku!!! Suke!! do it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Kyoshiro family is about to go on a rampage!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Bnugh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WHOAAA!! BIG BROO OOOOO!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HUUUUUuh!? What's with that soba shop owner? He's so strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, how wonder. Full!:) Mr. Soba-Shop- owner...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Let's do this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: FRAND- SUKEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop it, Dammit!! This is dangerous! What the hell are you doing to me!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AAA A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A AAH!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Suplex!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That carpenter is also....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But... this is pretty bad....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Eat it!! Hey, eat all of it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ABUGH GUGH NGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Eat all of the soba that you purposely knocked down to the ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Y-YOU...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You'll regret this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well... it went as expected, but... this is just asking for trouble... Is this situation okay?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: UFUFU... I guess we did fight back against some troublesome fellows...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Take a look.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The huge line that was here... has disappeared without a trace!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those guys are definitely going to come back with stronger forces!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the kid whose SOBA was spilled earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: she was laughing while crying. She's a weird child, that's for sure.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We still have one bowl that wasn't destroyed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Take it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Thank you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The specialty Soba noodles were really popular, so I definitely wanted to taste them! That's why I stood in line for so long!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to be honest... I stayed even though it would make me late for work!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I saved up my pocket change to finally buy your soba, but then those guys spilled it! I was really sad!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yummy! Y Y Y Y Y Y Y Y Y Y Yummy! Y o yummy!:)

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: A child from the capital

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahahaha haha!! I've never had Soba that's this yummy!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 39 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
